nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Visayan rhabdornis
nodes.summary: Visayan rhabdornis（Visayan rhabdornis，学名 Rhabdornis rabori），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It was previously considered a subspecies of the stripe-breasted rhabdornis. It lives in tropical moist montane forest and is threatened by habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It was previously considered a subspecies of the stripe-breasted rhabdornis. It lives in tropical moist montane forest and is threatened by habitat loss
